data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Acceptance criteria recheck. AC1 (sentinel) — false positive: grep matched 'review-gate-bypass-sentinel.sh', not shim sentinel. plugin.json not in CLAUDE.md. AC3 (.claude/commands/) — FAIL. AC4 (check-portability.sh/portability-ok) — FAIL. AC2 (plugins/dso/agents/) — PASS (line 87). AC5 (no /Users/ paths) — PASS. All three missing items require CLAUDE.md updates. Emitting three suggested-change reports (CLAUDE.md is read-only for this agent).
